mapper.sql: r.id, r.student_id, r.major_id, r.grade_id, r.class_id, r.student_status, r.enrollment_date, r.expected_graduation_date, r.actual_leave_date, r.remark, r.deleted, r.create_time, r.update_time, sp.student_no, sp.chinese_name, sp.english_name, m.college, m.major_name, m.degree_level, g.grade_name, c.class_name
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO academic_student_record (student_id, major_id, grade_id, class_id, student_status, enrollment_date, expected_graduation_date, actual_leave_date, remark) VALUES (#{studentId}, #{majorId}, #{gradeId}, #{classId}, #{studentStatus}, #{enrollmentDate}, #{expectedGraduationDate}, #{actualLeaveDate}, #{remark})
mapper.update: UPDATE academic_student_record SET major_id=#{majorId}, grade_id=#{gradeId}, class_id=#{classId}, student_status=#{studentStatus}, enrollment_date=#{enrollmentDate}, expected_graduation_date=#{expectedGraduationDate}, actual_leave_date=#{actualLeaveDate}, remark=#{remark}, update_time=NOW() WHERE id=#{id} AND deleted=0
UPDATE academic_student_record SET student_status=#{studentStatus}, actual_leave_date=#{actualLeaveDate}, remark=#{remark}, update_time=NOW() WHERE id=#{id} AND deleted=0
mapper.select: SELECT FROM academic_student_record r LEFT JOIN student_profile sp ON sp.id=r.student_id AND sp.deleted=0 LEFT JOIN academic_major m ON m.id=r.major_id AND m.deleted=0 LEFT JOIN academic_grade g ON g.id=r.grade_id AND g.deleted=0 LEFT JOIN academic_class c ON c.id=r.class_id AND c.deleted=0 WHERE r.id=#{id} AND r.deleted=0

SELECT FROM academic_student_record r LEFT JOIN student_profile sp ON sp.id=r.student_id AND sp.deleted=0 LEFT JOIN academic_major m ON m.id=r.major_id AND m.deleted=0 LEFT JOIN academic_grade g ON g.id=r.grade_id AND g.deleted=0 LEFT JOIN academic_class c ON c.id=r.class_id AND c.deleted=0 WHERE r.student_id=#{studentId} AND r.deleted=0 LIMIT 1

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM academic_student_record r LEFT JOIN student_profile sp ON sp.id=r.student_id AND sp.deleted=0 LEFT JOIN academic_major m ON m.id=r.major_id AND m.deleted=0 LEFT JOIN academic_grade g ON g.id=r.grade_id AND g.deleted=0 LEFT JOIN academic_class c ON c.id=r.class_id AND c.deleted=0

SELECT FROM academic_student_record r LEFT JOIN student_profile sp ON sp.id=r.student_id AND sp.deleted=0 LEFT JOIN academic_major m ON m.id=r.major_id AND m.deleted=0 LEFT JOIN academic_grade g ON g.id=r.grade_id AND g.deleted=0 LEFT JOIN academic_class c ON c.id=r.class_id AND c.deleted=0
ORDER BY r.create_time DESC, r.id DESC LIMIT #{query.offset}, #{query.limit}
